SEARCH
Package db

Class DatabaseManager

java.lang.Object
db.DatabaseManager
public class DatabaseManager extends Object
The central manager for database operations. Handles connectivity, schema initialization, and user security.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • DatabaseManager

      public DatabaseManager()

  • Method Details

    • connect

      public static Connection connect()
      Establishes a connection to the SQLite database file. Uses the JDBC driver to create a communication bridge.
      Returns:
      A Connection object if successful, otherwise null.

    • initializeDatabase

      public static void initializeDatabase()
      Sets up the database structure by creating tables for users and products. It also inserts a default test administrator account.

    • authenticateUser

      public static String authenticateUser(String username, String password)
      Validates user credentials against the database records. Uses PreparedStatement to prevent SQL injection attacks.
      Parameters:
      username - The username entered in the login form.
      password - The password entered in the login form.
      Returns:
      The role of the user (e.g., Manager, Chef) if valid, or null if invalid.

    • getAllProductsList

      public static ArrayList<Product> getAllProductsList()
      Fetches all products and returns them as a List of objects. This ensures the connection is CLOSED immediately after reading.

    • addProduct

      public static void addProduct(String name, double price, int stock) throws SQLException
      Inserts a new sweet product into the database. Includes Exception Handling for data safety.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • getAllUsers

      public static ResultSet getAllUsers()
      Fetches all users (Staff) from the database.

    • addUser

      public static void addUser(String name, String role, String password) throws SQLException
      Adds a new staff member.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • deleteProduct

      public static void deleteProduct(int id) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • updateProduct

      public static void updateProduct(int id, String name, double price, int stock) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • deleteUser

      public static void deleteUser(int id) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • updateUser

      public static void updateUser(int id, String name, String role) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • reduceStock

      public static void reduceStock(int productId, int quantity) throws SQLException
      Reduces the stock quantity of a product after a successful sale. This is a core part of the system logic to prevent selling items not in stock.
      Parameters:
      productId - The ID of the sweet to be updated.
      quantity - The number of items sold.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If stock is insufficient or database error occurs.

    • saveSale

      public static void saveSale(String cashierName, double total, List<OrderItem> items) throws SQLException
      Saves a complete sale transaction to the database. Demonstrates complex logical integration.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • getPendingSales

      public static ResultSet getPendingSales()

    • getSaleItems

      public static ResultSet getSaleItems(int saleId)

    • updateSaleStatus

      public static void updateSaleStatus(int saleId) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • getReadySales

      public static ResultSet getReadySales()
      جلب الطلبات التي انتهى الشيف من تحضيرها (Ready)

    • getReadyOrdersList

      public static ArrayList<Object[]> getReadyOrdersList()
      جلب الطلبات التي أصبحت جاهزة للتسليم (Ready)

    • markAsDelivered

      public static void markAsDelivered(int id) throws SQLException
      تحديث حالة الطلب إلى مكتمل (Completed) عند تسليمه للزبون
      Throws:
      SQLException
